market_pulse: Saturday late evening activity shows strong talent lineups across premium venues with David Guetta headlining LIV Beach, Lil Tunechi at Zouk, and sustained R&B programming at OMNIA and Hakkasan driving engagement across platforms.

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: LIV Beach performing well with Guetta draw. Monitor Nightclub for weekend tapings/surprise guest announcements. Content strategy strong; maintain current cadence.
